positive: A stylized, highly detailed, symmetrical cosmic woodland creature silhouette, rendered in a vibrant bioluminescent ink style. The central subject is a graceful guardian deer whose antlers are formed by swirling nebula dust and luminous crystalline flora. The background features abstract, stylized representations of starry constellations and deep indigo cosmic vapor, framing the central figure. Use sharp, defined edges and clean vector-like outlines. Color palette: electric cyan, deep sapphire, vivid magenta, and pure black for contrast. Composition: Centered, highly graphic, suitable for seamless apparel print. Style: Mixed media ink illustration, Art Nouveau meets Psychedelic Deco.
negative: blur, noise, grainy, smudge, signature, logo, watermark, text, excessive details, lowres, amateur, gradient sky, human hands, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs
